rationale: Classic NAND reversion: AI restocking + BiCS10/Kioxia capacity (2027) crush ASPs; GM falls toward mid-cycle 30s; NBM floors one-third of bits but variable pricing collapses on the rest. Cyclical trough EPS ~$10-14; cyclical 8-10x -> ~$100-120. The 50x run unwinds hard.

Shortage persists into 2027 but margins ease from the 78% peak as capacity lands; NBM holds a higher trough than history. Normalized EPS ~$28-36 on a downcycle-aware ~12-15x (cyclical) -> ~$400-500. Still far below the parabolic price.

NBM + AI-storage durably reset NAND to a structurally higher floor (the company's thesis); peak-ish margins persist 2+ yrs; $42B backlog + buyback compound. Even crediting a generous durable ~$55 EPS at a premium-for-NAND 18x -> ~$990. STILL below $2,288.92 -- i.e. even the bull fair value does not support new money at the current price.

OPTICAL ONLY (not a fair value): annualizing the Q4 guide (~$30-33/qtr x4 = ~$128 EPS) at 18x = ~$2,300, roughly the current price. This is the market pricing PEAK earnings as permanent -- the textbook low-P/E-at-the-top cyclical trap. Included to show the ONLY way to justify $2,288.92 is to capitalize peak NAND earnings forever.

0.30*108 + 0.45*448 + 0.25*990 = ~470. Probability-weighted fair value ~$470 is ~79% below the $2,288.92 price. New money has deeply negative expected MOS; the entire bull-case distribution sits below the price.
